events.title: The United Nations is founded amid rising US-Soviet tension
The Marshall Plan begins rebuilding Europe
The Soviet Union tests its first atomic bomb
Communists win the Chinese Civil War
An armistice ends the fighting in Korea
The Cuban Revolution brings Castro to power
Construction begins on the Berlin Wall
The United States sends combat troops to Vietnam
Apollo 11 lands astronauts on the Moon
The United States withdraws from Vietnam
Gorbachev becomes Soviet leader and launches reforms
